question: How do I create an account?
answer: Click 'Join Free' on the homepage and enter your email and password. You can also sign up with Google or Apple. After verifying your email, pick your role — listener or artist — and you're in.

question: Can I switch between listener and artist roles?
answer: Yes. Go to Settings → Profile → Role and switch anytime. Your listening history and saved tracks are preserved when you switch to artist mode.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your email. You'll receive a reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder if it doesn't arrive.

question: Can I delete my account?
answer: Yes. Go to Settings → Account → Delete Account. This is permanent and will remove all your uploads, saved tracks, and profile data. We cannot recover deleted accounts.

question: What audio formats can I upload?
answer: We accept MP3, WAV, FLAC, and AAC files up to 50MB per track. For best quality, upload lossless WAV or FLAC at 44.1kHz / 16-bit minimum. Clips must be 30 seconds to 3 minutes long.

question: How long until my track goes live?
answer: Most tracks are reviewed and published within 2–4 hours. During high traffic periods this may extend to 24 hours. You'll get an email notification once your track is live.

question: Can I edit or delete a track after uploading?
answer: Yes. Go to your Dashboard → My Tracks, select the track, and choose Edit or Delete. You can update the title, cover art, and description. Replacing the audio file requires re-uploading.

question: Why was my track rejected?
answer: Tracks are rejected for low audio quality, copyright violations, explicit content without proper tagging, or incomplete metadata. You'll receive an email with the specific reason and can re-upload after fixing the issue.

question: Is MusicMenia free to use?
answer: Listening is completely free, forever. Artists get 5 free uploads per month. For unlimited uploads, analytics, and priority review, the Artist Pro plan is ₹299/month.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Settings → Billing → Cancel Plan. Your Pro features stay active until the end of your billing period. No cancellation fees — cancel anytime.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept UPI, credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, RuPay), net banking, and PayPal. All payments are processed securely via Razorpay.

question: Can I get a refund?
answer: Refunds are available within 7 days of purchase if you have not used any Pro features. Contact support with your order ID and we'll process it within 3–5 business days.

question: How do royalties work?
answer: Artists earn per stream based on a revenue-share model. Payouts are processed monthly via UPI, bank transfer, or PayPal once your balance reaches ₹500. Check your dashboard for detailed earnings.

question: Can I upload cover songs?
answer: Yes, with a mechanical license. We've partnered with a licensing provider to make this easy — you'll be prompted during upload if the track is detected as a cover. Original compositions are always preferred.

question: How do I get my music on the Explore feed?
answer: New uploads are automatically eligible for the Explore feed. Tracks with complete metadata, high-quality cover art, and good early engagement are prioritized by our algorithm.

question: Can I collaborate with other artists on the platform?
answer: Yes. You can tag collaborators when uploading a track. All tagged artists will have the track appear on their profile and share in the stream count. Royalty splits must be agreed upon outside the platform for now.

question: How do I follow an artist?
answer: Visit any artist's profile and click the Follow button. You'll see their new uploads in your feed and receive notifications when they go live.

question: Can I share tracks outside the app?
answer: Yes. Each track has a shareable link you can copy and post anywhere. Listeners who don't have an account can still play a preview before being prompted to sign up.

question: How do I report inappropriate content?
answer: Tap the three-dot menu on any track or profile and select Report. Our moderation team reviews all reports within 24 hours. Repeated violations result in account suspension.

question: Is there a way to message artists directly?
answer: Not yet — direct messaging is on our roadmap. For now, you can leave comments on tracks or tag artists in the community feed to get their attention.
